HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colleen Cohen, Esq. of Modena Royce, Tel. 650.589.3913, for plaintiff and moving party;
Odilong Vasconcelos, Tel. 415.290.3286, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf via Court Call;
Michael Zack, non-party, courier for Mr. Vasconcelos, also present in court.

RULING: Courier brought documents supporting Mr. Vasconcelos' claim and presented them to the court and to plaintiff's counsel. The court reviewed the documents and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ODILON VASCONCELOS' Claim of Exemption is granted. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
